headline: Humana (HUM) Stock Stays Near Fair Value As Earnings And Growth Pull Apart
summary: Humana’s share price has surged over the last year, yet its valuation checks paint a more balanced picture, suggesting the stock no longer looks obviously cheap or clearly expensive at current levels. Humana is up 68.6% over the past year, which puts extra focus on whether today’s price still leaves much room for error. The expansion of Humana’s Medicaid presence through the upcoming Illinois HealthChoice program can support longer term earnings potential, while investor attention on future...

headline: UNH's $1.5B AI Push: Can It Deliver More Than Cost Savings?
summary: UnitedHealth plans to invest nearly $1.5B in AI for 2026, expanding automation, digital tools and software platforms to drive growth beyond traditional cost savings.
